before:
Don't put up a whole fence, plant privacy in your backyard with Aosom. Aosom offers you a freestanding privacy screen that stays stable with wide feet and expansion screws. The willow branch style brings the atmosphere of the tropics to your garden space or indoor room. The enough height makes it excellent for entryways, secluded sitting spaces, and hidden hot tubs.

Features:

  • • Outdoor-ready steel frame with protective paint
  • • Vertically composed of three panels
  • • Wide feet and four expansion screws to keep stable
  • • Recommend that you weight the feet with sandbags or other weights
  • • Assembly required

Specification:

  • • Style: Willow Branch
  • • Color: Black
  • • Material: Steel
  • • Overall Dimension: 48" L x 17.7" W x 78" H (122 x 45 x 198 cm)
  • • Panel Bottom Height: 7.1" (18cm)
  • • Item Label: 844-610V00BK

Package Includes:

  • • 1 x Outdoor Privacy Screen
  • • 4 x Expansion Screw

before:
This Outsunny walk-in tunnel greenhouse provides the perfect protected environment for year-round gardening without breaking the bank. Ideal for Canadian growing conditions!

Key Features:

  • Spacious design : 20 x 10 x 7 ft (6 x 3 x 2.1 m) for ample growing space
  • Heavy-duty galvanized steel frame with powder coating resists chipping and Canadian weather
  • 8 roll-up mesh windows for cross-ventilation and optimal climate control
  • Zippered roll-up door 65.75" x 65.75" for easy access and can stay open
  • Durable transparent PE cover tear-resistant while allowing nourishing sunlight through
  • Flexible installation : hard surface setup or anchor into soft soil
  • Complete accessory kit : ground stakes, ropes, tethers and mounting tape included
  • 4-season protection from cold, frost, hail and extreme weather

Free shipping across Canada. Assembly required. Weight: 34 kg.

before:
Extend your growing season with this premium Outsunny walk-in greenhouse. Perfect for Canadian gardeners, this heavy-duty greenhouse protects your plants from harsh weather while creating the ideal growing environment year-round.

Key Features:

  • All-season protection - Shields crops from cold, frost, and hail damage
  • UV-resistant PE cover - Maintains humidity while allowing nourishing sunlight through
  • Reinforced steel frame - Powder-coated finish resists rust and chipping
  • Superior ventilation - 2 zippered doors and 4 roll-up windows with netting
  • Stable installation - 12 ground pegs included for maximum stability
  • Easy plant access - Large roll-up door for convenient plant management
  • Spacious design - 6.6' W x 10' D x 7' H interior space

Specifications:
• Overall dimensions: 78.75" W x 118" D x 86.5" H
• Eave height: 67" H
• Net weight: 53 lbs
• Materials: Steel frame with PE cover
• Color: White/Grey
• Assembly required

Free shipping across Canada

before:
Aosom bar stools blend functionality with trendiness! Crafted with a chic PU faux leather cover and substantial padding, they deliver comfort and flair. The supportive backrest and armless design of these counter stools facilitate easy seating and standing, while the hefty metal base ensures these cushioned stools are perfectly balanced.

Features:

  • Set of 2 stools, suitable for home and multiple spaces
  • Swivel seat adjustable from counter height to bar height
  • Padded and comfortable seat and backrest
  • Lower footrest prevents legs from dangling
  • Solid tubular metal base with non-skid rubber pads
  • Gas lever enhances stability and prevents wobbling during use
  • Assembly required
  • Durable metal construction with quality finish

before:
Wish you could pack up the comfort of the resort and bring it with you on the road? You're just a step closer. Aosom foldable chaise lounge is convenient and functional design so you can lay back in the sun at the beach, camping, or the pool. It feature reclining backrests with four positions, face hole, to creat a comfort seating. With water in mind, their mesh surface dries off fast, even if you just got out of the pool.

Features:

  • • For a people to tan or lounge around the pool together on
  • • Back reclines to 4 different positions to find the great tanning angle
  • • Foldable design to make carry & transport easy
  • • Load-bearing, water-safe powder-coated metal frame
  • • Design with reading hole
  • • No assembly required

Specification:

  • • Colour: Black, Mixed Grey
  • • Materials: Steel, Mesh Fabric, Polyester
  • • Fully Reclined Dimension: 28.3" W x 76.4" D x 12.2" H (72 x 194 x 31 cm)
  • • Folded Dimension: 28.3" W x 33.5" D x 6.3" H (72 x 85 x 16 cm)
  • • Seat Dimension: 22.8" W x 52.4" D (58 x 133 cm)
  • • Backrest Dimension: 21.7" L x 22.4" W (55 x 57 cm)
  • • Backrest Height to Ground: 35", 32.3", 28", 15.7" (89, 82, 71, 40 cm)
  • • Headrest Dimension: 14.6" L x 6.7" W x 2" H (37 x 17 x 5 cm)
  • • Reading Hole Dimension: 6.7" L x 6.3" W (17 x 16 cm)
  • • Weight Capacity: 264 lbs (120 kg)
  • • Item Label: 84G-391V00GG

Package Includes:

  • • 1 x Sun Lounger
  • • 1 x Manual

before:
Bring bbq on the go. Aosom has a small, portable charcoal smoker with a spacious 235 square-inch surface. Get ready to party when you can serve up to 6 people. Bring BBQ to picnics, camping trips or tailgating events; it's easy to carry and compact for a smoker you can keep in your car. Seal in heat and seal in flavor with a lid featuring a thermometer and safe-to-the-touch handles. Controls on the vent and chimney let you adjust heat as you stay informed. Get out, cook out with Aosom.

Features:

  • • A lid that seals in heat and flavor
  • • Easy-to-read thermometer to show the temperature with the lid down
  • • Adjustable vents and chimney to adjust the heat
  • • Warming rack
  • • Pull-out ash catcher under the charcoal basin for easy cleaning
  • • Powder-coated galvanized steel to resist heat and water
  • • Anti-scald silica gel handles for safe operation and a more portable build
  • • Assembly required

Specification:

  • • Colour: Black
  • • Materials: Cast Iron, Galvanized Steel, Silica Gel, Stainless Steel
  • • Overall Dimensions: 26.4" L x 20.9" W x 21.7" H(67L x 53W x 55H cm)
  • • Smoker Grate: 14.4" L x 8.3" W(36L x 21W cm)
  • • Warming Grate: 15.7" L x 5.5" W(40L x 14W cm)
  • • Charcoal Grate: 17.7" L x 13.4" W(45L x 34W cm)
  • • Ash Pan: 18.9" L x 16.1" W x 0.8" H(48L x 41W x 2H cm)
  • • Weight Capacity: 22 lbs(10 kg)
  • • Item Label: 846-134V00BK

Package Includes:

  • • 1 x Smoker
  • • 2 x Smoker Grate
  • • 1 x Warming Rack
  • • 1 x Manual

before:
Aosom offers a market umbrella base with heavy-duty weight to fix your sunshade firmly in place. This three-in-one patio umbrella stand also works as an end table or as a flower box when removing the top. It's capable of holding 175 lb (80 kg) of sand and can support even extra-large umbrellas. Made from strong PE plastic for reliable outdoor use, fitted with two wheels to roll easily when full. Create your own oasis with Aosom.

Features:

  • • 3-in-1 design: umbrella stand, side table, or planter box
  • • 175 lb (80 kg) sand filling weight fits large parasol
  • • Applicable for umbrella with 1.5" (3.8 cm) or 1.9" (4.8 cm) diameter pole
  • • Two wheels allow easy movement
  • • Built-in side handles for easy carrying
  • • PE body and powder-coated metal pole for outdoor use
  • • Two tightening knobs secure umbrella poles in place
  • • Simple assembly required

Specification:

  • • Colour: Brown
  • • Materials: PE, Metal
  • • Overall Dimension: 20.9" L x 20.9" W x 18.5" H (53 x 53 x 47 cm)
  • • Bottom Base Size: 17.7" L x 17.7" W x 9.4" H (45 x 45 x 24 cm)
  • • Pole Size: Dia. 2.2" x 17.3" H (Dia. 5.6 x 44 cm)
  • • Fits Umbrella Pole Diameter: 1.5" (3.8 cm), 1.9" (4.8 cm)
  • • Weight After Filling: 175 lb/80 kg (Sand)
  • • Net Weight: 14 lb (6.5 kg)
  • • Item Label: 84D-250V00BN
  • • Suitable Umbrella: For Aosom parent SKU X-84D-031
  • • Note: Please measure your umbrella pole diameter in advance to ensure that our base can fit well.

Package Includes:

  • • 1 x Umbrella Base
  • • 1 x Manual
